REMILIA-REMILIA.cardsModifierDescription: Remilia's cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
REMILIA-REMILIA.description:
A vampire who resides in the Scarlet Devil Mansion as its head.
She possesses the ability to manipulate fate.
REMILIA-REMILIA.eventDeathPrevention: This can't be... I can't believe that I-of all people- would actually...
REMILIA-REMILIA.goldMonologue: Line spoken when obtaining a large amount of gold
REMILIA-REMILIA.title: Remilia Scarlet
